name: Feature Implementation Planner
description: After api-design and data-model have synchronised via soft-align, produces the implementation task breakdown with file-by-file engineering steps.

checks.prompt: Produce a feature implementation plan: list exactly 8 engineering tasks in order with (1) file path, (2) change type (create/modify), (3) one-sentence description, (4) estimated effort (XS/S/M). The tasks should cover: data layer, business logic, API handler, validation, error handling, and tests.

Identify the risk areas in this feature implementation: (1) breaking changes to existing APIs, (2) migration risk, (3) auth surface changes, (4) performance-sensitive paths. Recommend mitigation for each. Context: {retryContext}
